notes: Non-sensitive hardware capability snapshot. No hostnames, usernames, secrets, or machine-unique identifiers. Regenerate after driver, WSL, or hardware changes.

cpu.implication: No AVX-512 and no AMX: CPU-side INT4/INT8 MoE kernels that require AVX-512/AMX (for example KTransformers AMX backend) fall back to slower AVX2 paths.

memory.note: WSL2 memory ceiling is configured below host physical RAM. Admission decisions must use the WSL-visible value, not the host value.

wsl2_constraints.fp8_tensor_cores: not verified as exposed through dxgkrnl; community reports show FP8 falling back to slow emulated paths under WSL2
wsl2_constraints.recommended_quantization_under_wsl2: GGUF K-quants (llama.cpp) or AWQ/GPTQ Marlin INT4 (vLLM/SGLang)

storage.type: WSL2 virtual disk (VHDX) backed by NVMe
storage.sequential_read_method: dd iflag=direct, 512 MiB and 1 GiB samples from existing model files (read-only)
storage.random_read: not measured (avoided invasive benchmarking on the live system)

capacity_model.observed_steady_state: general 35B-A3B Q4_K_M weights (~21 GiB) + embedder 0.6B Q8 (~0.7 GiB) + KV cache at 8K context consume ~23.9 GiB of 24.4 GiB
capacity_model.conclusion: The GPU operates at capacity with one heavy model plus the GPU-resident embedder. Any additional GPU provider requires stopping the active heavy profile first, or moving the embedder to CPU.
